title: Quality of recovery and safety of deep intravenous sedation compared to general anesthesia in facial plastic surgery: A prospective cohort study.
reconciliation_notes: Non-randomized cohort study comparing anesthesia in facial plastic surgery, not mental health pharmacotherapy

title: The case-finding study: A novel community-based research recruitment approach for engaging participants with early cognitive decline.
reconciliation_notes: Observational recruitment/screening study for cognitive decline in Canada, not an RCT

title: Increased spindle density correlates with sleep continuity improvements following an eight-week course of a melatonin agonist in people with depression: A proof-of-concept study with agomelatine.
reconciliation_notes: Open-label (not RCT) proof-of-concept study of agomelatine for depression with sleep outcomes in Canada. Not a randomized controlled trial
column8: Open-label agomelatine study for depression with sleep outcomes. Robillard (Canadian PI at Ottawa). Open-label not RCT, proof-of-concept design. Need to verify study design

title: An inactive control of the 'Trier Social Stress Test' for Youth 10-17 years: Neuroendocrine, cardiac, and subjective responses.
reconciliation_notes: Experimental stress paradigm validation study in healthy youth, not mental health pharmacotherapy

title: Comparing the Multicomponent Coping Power Program to Individualized Parent-Child Treatment for Improving the Parenting Efficacy and Satisfaction of Parents of Children with Conduct Problems.
reconciliation_notes: Non-pharmacological Coping Power vs individualized treatment RCT for conduct problems in Canada, non-pharmacological

title: The effect of time perspectives on mental health information processing and help-seeking attitudes and intentions in younger versus older adults.
reconciliation_notes: Experimental psychology study of mental health info processing, not pharmacotherapy RCT

title: Sexually Dimorphic Behavioral and Genetic Outcomes Associated With Administration of TA65 (A Telomerase Activator) Following Repetitive Traumatic Brain Injury: A Pilot Study.
reconciliation_notes: Animal (rat) study of telomerase activator following TBI, not a human mental health pharmacotherapy RCT

title: Colonoscopy Trainers Experience Greater Stress During Insertion than Withdrawal: Implications for Endoscopic Curricula.
reconciliation_notes: Colonoscopy training stress assessment study, not mental health pharmacotherapy

title: Behavior of Adult 5-HT1A Receptor Knockout Mice Exposed to Stress During Prenatal Development.
reconciliation_notes: Animal (mouse) study of prenatal stress and serotonin receptors, not a human clinical trial

title: The responsiveness of goal attainment scaling using just one goal in controlled clinical trials: an exploratory analysis.
reconciliation_notes: Exploratory secondary analysis of GAS methodology from Alzheimer's and geriatric trials, not a primary RCT

title: Quantitative susceptibility mapping at 3 T: comparison of acquisition methodologies.
reconciliation_notes: MRI methodology study comparing QSM acquisition strategies in healthy adults, not mental health pharmacotherapy

title: Nortriptyline for pain in knee osteoarthritis: a double-blind randomised controlled trial in New Zealand general practice.
reconciliation_notes: Nortriptyline RCT for knee OA pain in New Zealand; not mental health pharmacotherapy and not Canadian

title: Attachment and Childhood Maltreatment as Moderators of Treatment Outcome in a Randomized Clinical Trial for Provoked Vestibulodynia.
reconciliation_notes: Secondary analysis of RCT for provoked vestibulodynia; not a mental health disorder

title: Functional Connectivity Features of Resting-State Functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging May Distinguish Migraine From Tension-Type Headache.
reconciliation_notes: fMRI connectivity study comparing migraine vs TTH in China; observational neuroimaging not a pharmacotherapy RCT

title: The EPIPHA-KNEE trial: Explaining Pain to target unhelpful pain beliefs to Increase PHysical Activity in KNEE osteoarthritis - a protocol for a multicentre randomised controlled trial.
reconciliation_notes: Protocol only for physiotherapy + pain education RCT for knee OA in Australia; no results

title: Changes in Neuropsychiatric Inventory Associated with Semagacestat Treatment of Alzheimers Disease.
reconciliation_notes: Semagacestat (gamma-secretase inhibitor) RCT for AD examining NPI outcomes. Canadian PIs (Lanctot, Herrmann). Secondary NPI analysis from primary semagacestat trials; need to verify Canadian site and if primary results
